description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly convex carapace with a mottled orange and white coloration. The crab has two prominent claws (chelae), one of which is slightly larger, and eight slender walking legs that taper to points. Its eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and two thin antennae are visible extending forward. The underside and leg joints display lighter, almost pinkish hues, while the upper shell is more robust and textured. The overall appearance suggests a marine crustacean commonly found in coastal environments, with a hard exoskeleton and articulated limbs.
description: A detailed, orange-and-white crab with a hard shell, two claws, and eight pointed legs. Its eyes are on short stalks and antennae are visible at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's wide carapace, both claws extended, and eyes on stalks facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's body depth, one claw raised, and the segmentation of the legs and joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the arrangement of the legs, and the subtle curve of the shell.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view emphasizing the crab's body profile, leg articulation, and the asymmetry of the claws.
